overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a homeless encampment beneath urban overpasses, ascending stairs to an elevated pedestrian walkway littered with bodies and blood, with futuristic city architecture and a ferris wheel visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking past a food vendor cart with a grill in a shaded underpass area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food cart grilling meat

entered.detail: red and silver food cart with meat grilling on top
black and white striped tarp providing shade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a shaded underpass encampment with a food vendor cart in the foreground. A vendor tends to meat on a grill while another character sits nearby. Blue tarps and striped awnings provide shelter in this semi-covered concrete space.

events.description: moving deeper into the underpass away from the vendor area

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor lined with tents and makeshift shelters

entered.detail: metal barrel with fire burning inside providing warmth
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overpass
tent constructed from tarps and scrap materials

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the underpass corridor, the camera passes burning barrels and concrete support pillars. Makeshift tents line the sides as the space becomes more enclosed and darker.

events.description: emerging into a more open area of the underpass with better visibility

agents.ego_description: walking past a group of people sitting on couches watching television

notable_agents.action: three characters sitting on couches watching a television set

entered.detail: worn brown couches arranged in a living room setup
old CRT television displaying a show

segments.scene_description: The underpass opens into a makeshift living area where three people sit on brown couches watching television. The lighting improves as the space widens, with concrete pillars framing the scene.

events.description: exits the underpass into bright sunlight under highway overpasses
moving from shadow into direct sunlight creating harsh shadows

agents.ego_description: walking through a sunlit concrete area beneath massive highway overpasses

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway overpass with multiple levels
futuristic building with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass into bright midday sun, the scene reveals a vast concrete area beneath towering highway overpasses. The camera approaches a staircase while futuristic glass buildings rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase ascending to upper level

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs to upper pedestrian level

agents.ego_description: climbing a wide concrete staircase with metal railings

entered.detail: silver metal handrails along the staircase
transparent glass and metal roof structure visible at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase with metal railings, moving from the ground level up toward a glass-canopied pedestrian walkway. Sunlight creates dramatic shadows on the steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with planters and bodies

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters glass-roofed pedestrian walkway
discovers multiple dead bodies and blood stains on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through an elevated walkway observing dead bodies and blood stains while approaching a ferris wheel

entered.detail: covered pedestrian bridge with glass roof and metal supports
large rectangular planters with overgrown vegetation
tall digital advertising screens displaying colorful graphics
large white ferris wheel visible in the distance
tall dark building with grid-patterned windows

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a glass-roofed pedestrian walkway littered with dead bodies and blood stains. Wooden planters with overgrown plants line the path while digital billboards display advertisements. The camera moves toward a large ferris wheel visible between futuristic buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, sheltered depths of an urban underpass encampment into the stark, violent openness of an elevated city walkway. It begins in a shaded concrete space beside a food vendor's grill and blue tarps, moving deeper into a darkening corridor lined with burning barrels and makeshift tents. As the camera pushes forward, the space widens into a makeshift living area with people watching television before finally emerging into the bright midday sun beneath towering highway overpasses. The perspective then ascends a wide concrete staircase, climbing from the ground level toward a glass-canopied bridge. The scene culminates as the camera reaches the top, revealing a walkway littered with bodies and blood stains, with digital billboards and a distant ferris wheel framing the futuristic skyline.
